findings.issue: Inconsistent path style: Task 2 uses absolute Windows path 'C:/tmp/ai-dev-repo/shared/design-references/color-psychology.md' in Context Files, while Task 1 uses relative path '../../../shared/design-references/color-psychology.md' for the same file. Both resolve correctly to the existing file, but mixing absolute and relative paths in task context links is fragile — absolute paths break if the repo is cloned to a different location.
findings.fix: Replace the absolute path with a relative path: [color-psychology.md](../../../shared/design-references/color-psychology.md)
